PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Continued To Apr-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Continued To Mar-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Omar Krashna for Cindy Yu (appeared via telephone). Michael Lew for (surviving spouse) Li Zi Chen.

Mr. Lew stated that his client did not file a petition as he was waiting for the Public Administrator to appear. The court explained that the Public Administrator would not be appearing on this case. Mr. Lew stated that they will file their petition and Mr. Krashna confirmed that his petition would be withdrawn. The petition for letters of administration was continued to March 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing Ms. Chen's petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Continued To Mar-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Continued To Feb-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lew for and with Li Zi Chen (Surviving Spouse). Omar Krashna for Cindy Yu (Petitioner). Shawn Yu (Son of Ms. Chen) also present.

Mr. Krashna stated that Mr. Lew is going to assume administration of the Estate and file a petition for appointment or a spousal property petition, and that he will withdraw his petition. Mr. Lew stated that he believes the property is held in community property for two thirds and one third with the Son as tenants in common, and that it is his intention to file a spousal property petition but that there is still the Lis Pendens. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to February 3, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to the Public Administrator and for determination of the quiet title action.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
